arts.ttl: Liam Payne's boyhood football club West Brom pay tribute to tragic star
arts.sum: Tributes have been pouring in for the former One Direction star Liam Payne, aged 31, who tragically died after a fall from a hotel balcony in Argentina. West Bromwich Albion, the team Payne passionately supported have expressed their condolences following the devastating incident.
